title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind
summary: Gemini 3 Flash Preview processes audio with speaker labels, timestamps, emotion tags, and language detection in a single API call. Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is a sound-to-sound real-time multimodal model with integrated reasoning that handles both speech understanding and generation directed by natural language prompts.
writeup: Thor Schaeff of Google DeepMind walks through Gemini's audio stack across two models. Gemini 3 Flash Preview handles transcription in a single API call, returning speaker labels, timestamps, emotion tags, and language detection together. Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is a sound-to-sound real-time multimodal model with integrated reasoning, covering both speech understanding and generation, with behavior directed by natural language prompts. The takeaway is that a single audio pipeline now spans structured transcription and live, prompt-controlled speech interaction.
